Darius.trading_pattern: Darius Q bleed is oppressive. Your Q poke is safe from range. Trade Q and E poke when safe.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: His Q outer ring bleed — walk backward to avoid outer ring. Keep distance.
Darius.early_game: Darius dominates close. Trade Q and E poke from range. Don't extend.
Darius.mid_game: Your poke scales. His ult is deadly — maintain distance always.
Darius.late_game: You outscale through poke damage. He struggles if you kite.
Darius.win_condition: Trade Q and E poke from range. Avoid bleed. Scale into late.
Darius.positioning: Trade Q and E from range. Maintain distance. Never close gap.

Garen.trading_pattern: Garen Q silence dominates close. Your Q poke is safe from range. Trade from distance.
Garen.ability_to_dodge: His Q silence wind-up — move back when he charges. Keep distance.
Garen.early_game: Garen dominates close. Trade Q from range. Use E to slow if he approaches.
Garen.mid_game: Your poke scales. His tankiness improves. Maintain distance.
Garen.late_game: Even — both scale well. Your poke vs his tankiness.
Garen.win_condition: Trade Q from range. Use E to slow. Scale into late.
Garen.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use E to kite. Never close gap.

Fiora.trading_pattern: Fiora's parry negates your Q. Your E slow helps kite. Trade from max range.
Fiora.ability_to_dodge: Her parry W — trade from distance before she can parry.
Fiora.early_game: Fiora's parry is oppressive. Trade Q from max range only.
Fiora.mid_game: Your poke scales. Her split push is strong. Avoid close fights.
Fiora.late_game: You outscale through poke. Fiora struggles if spaced.
Fiora.win_condition: Trade Q from max range. Use E to slow. Avoid parry.
Fiora.positioning: Trade Q at max range. Use E to kite. Never close gap.

Jax.trading_pattern: Jax's dueling is oppressive. Your Q poke is safe from range. Trade from distance.
Jax.ability_to_dodge: His E stun counter — trade from max range before he engages.
Jax.early_game: Jax dominates close. Trade Q from range. Use E to slow.
Jax.mid_game: Your poke scales. His dueling is still strong. Avoid close fights.
Jax.late_game: You outscale through poke. Jax struggles if spaced.
Jax.win_condition: Trade Q from range. Use E to slow. Avoid E range.
Jax.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use E to kite. Never engage.

Riven.trading_pattern: Riven's combo is oppressive. Your Q poke is safe from range. Trade from distance.
Riven.ability_to_dodge: Her Q dash — trade from max range before she closes.
Riven.early_game: Riven's burst dominates. Trade Q from range. Never close gap.
Riven.mid_game: Your poke scales. Her split push is strong. Teamfight instead.
Riven.late_game: You outscale through poke. Riven struggles grouped.
Riven.win_condition: Trade Q from range. Use E to kite. Group for teamfights.
Riven.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use E to kite. Group for fights.

Aatrox.trading_pattern: Aatrox Q range is massive. Your Q matches his range. Trade Q and E poke.
Aatrox.ability_to_dodge: His Q skillshots — move sideways. Use E to slow if he closes.
Aatrox.early_game: Aatrox Q dominates early. Trade Q and E poke from range.
Aatrox.mid_game: Your poke scales. His Q still hurts. Maintain distance.
Aatrox.late_game: You outscale through poke. He falls off.
Aatrox.win_condition: Trade Q and E from range. Avoid his Q. Scale into late.
Aatrox.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use E to kite. Dodge Q skillshots.

Mordekaiser.trading_pattern: Mordekaiser's all-in is oppressive. Your Q poke is safe. Trade from distance.
Mordekaiser.ability_to_dodge: His E pull — trade from max range before he pulls.
Mordekaiser.early_game: Mordekaiser dominates. Trade Q from range. Use E to slow.
Mordekaiser.mid_game: Your poke scales. His ult can isolate. Avoid 1v1s.
Mordekaiser.late_game: You outscale through poke. He struggles grouped.
Mordekaiser.win_condition: Trade Q from range. Use E to kite. Group for fights.
Mordekaiser.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use E to kite. Group for fights.

Nasus.trading_pattern: Nasus has zero early game. Your Q and E poke dominate. Trade aggressively early.
Nasus.ability_to_dodge: His W wither — move away or E slow him. Your poke is stronger.
Nasus.early_game: Dominate with Q and E poke. Nasus is helpless. Build a lead.
Nasus.mid_game: Your lead carries. His stacking helps. Use E to kite him.
Nasus.late_game: His stacks scale. You outscale through poke. Maintain distance.
Nasus.win_condition: Dominate early with Q and E. Build lead. Kite late.
Nasus.scaling: He outscales through stacks — you through poke.
Nasus.positioning: Poke aggressively early. Use E to kite late. Never close.

Sion.trading_pattern: Sion's Q poke is strong. Your Q and E poke match. Trade carefully.
Sion.ability_to_dodge: His Q slow — move sideways. E slow helps counter his approach.
Sion.early_game: Trade Q for Q. Use E to slow if he approaches.
Sion.mid_game: Both scale into tankiness. Your poke helps. Maintain distance.
Sion.late_game: Even — both scale well. Your poke vs his tankiness.
Sion.win_condition: Trade Q and E poke. Maintain distance. Scale into late.
Sion.positioning: Trade Q and E. Use E to kite. Maintain distance.

Malphite.trading_pattern: Malphite is tanky but low damage. Your Q outpokes. Trade Q poke gradually.
Malphite.ability_to_dodge: His E shockwave — move away. Your E slow helps counter.
Malphite.early_game: Malphite is hard to kill. Trade Q poke. Scale gradually.
Malphite.mid_game: Your poke scales. His tankiness improves. Maintain distance.
Malphite.late_game: Even — both scale well. Your poke helps.
Malphite.win_condition: Trade Q poke gradually. Maintain distance. Scale into late.
Malphite.positioning: Trade Q poke. Use E to kite. Maintain distance.

Kayle.trading_pattern: Kayle's early range is limited. Your Q poke is strong early. Trade aggressively.
Kayle.ability_to_dodge: Her R invincibility — don't commit when she ults.
Kayle.early_game: Dominate with Q poke. Kayle's range is limited early.
Kayle.mid_game: Her range extends. Your poke scales. Trade carefully.
Kayle.late_game: She scales well. You outscale through consistent poke.
Kayle.win_condition: Dominate early with Q. Build lead. Poke late.
Kayle.scaling: Even — both scale well late game.
Kayle.positioning: Trade Q aggressively early. Poke from range late.

Yorick.trading_pattern: Yorick's ghouls are oppressive early. Your Q and E poke are decent. Trade from range.
Yorick.ability_to_dodge: His E cage — move sideways. E slow helps kite.
Yorick.early_game: Yorick's ghouls zone you. Trade Q from range. Use E to slow.
Yorick.mid_game: Your poke scales. His maiden is strong. Avoid dueling.
Yorick.late_game: You outscale through poke. Avoid his 1v1s.
Yorick.win_condition: Trade Q from range. Use E to slow. Avoid dueling.
Yorick.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use E to kite. Never duel.

Illaoi.trading_pattern: Illaoi's E test is devastating. Your Q and E poke are safe. Trade from range.
Illaoi.ability_to_dodge: Her E tentacle test — move away from her. Use E to slow.
Illaoi.early_game: Illaoi's tentacles zone you. Trade Q from range. Avoid E.
Illaoi.mid_game: Your poke scales. Her tentacles zone. Maintain distance.
Illaoi.late_game: You outscale through poke. Avoid tentacles.
Illaoi.win_condition: Trade Q from range. Avoid E test. Use E to kite.
Illaoi.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use E to kite. Avoid tentacles.

Camille.trading_pattern: Camille's E hook is oppressive. Your Q poke is safe. Trade from distance.
Camille.ability_to_dodge: Her E hook — trade from max range before she hooks.
Camille.early_game: Camille's dueling dominates. Trade Q from range. Use E to slow.
Camille.mid_game: Your poke scales. Her dueling is strong. Avoid close fights.
Camille.late_game: You outscale through poke. Avoid dueling her.
Camille.win_condition: Trade Q from range. Use E to slow. Avoid E.
Camille.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use E to kite. Avoid E.

Olaf.trading_pattern: Olaf's Q slow is oppressive. Your Q and E poke are decent. Trade from range.
Olaf.ability_to_dodge: His Q axe slow — move sideways. E slow helps counter.
Olaf.early_game: Olaf's poke dominates. Trade Q from range. Use E to slow.
Olaf.mid_game: Your poke scales. His R makes him unkiteable. Use E wisely.
Olaf.late_game: You outscale through poke. Avoid his ult.
Olaf.win_condition: Trade Q from range. Use E to slow. Avoid his Q.
Olaf.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use E to kite. Avoid Q slow.

Ornn.trading_pattern: Ornn's W brittle is oppressive. Your Q poke is safe. Trade from distance.
Ornn.ability_to_dodge: His E charge — trade from max range before he charges.
Ornn.early_game: Ornn's all-in dominates. Trade Q from range. Use E to slow.
Ornn.mid_game: Your poke scales. His tankiness improves. Maintain distance.
Ornn.late_game: You outscale through poke. His upgrades are annoying.
Ornn.win_condition: Trade Q from range. Use E to slow. Avoid E.
Ornn.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use E to kite. Avoid E.

Maokai.trading_pattern: Maokai's W pull and Q poke are strong. Your Q poke is decent. Trade from range.
Maokai.ability_to_dodge: His W pull — trade from range before he pulls. Use E to slow.
Maokai.early_game: Maokai's poke is strong. Trade Q from range. Use E to slow.
Maokai.mid_game: Your poke scales. His tankiness improves. Maintain distance.
Maokai.late_game: Even — both scale well. Your poke helps.
Maokai.win_condition: Trade Q from range. Use E to kite. Scale into late.
Maokai.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use E to kite. Maintain distance.

Gnar.trading_pattern: Gnar's poke from range is oppressive. Your Q matches his range. Trade carefully.
Gnar.ability_to_dodge: His E hop — move away. E slow helps counter.
Gnar.early_game: Gnar's ranged poke dominates. Trade Q from range. Use E to slow.
Gnar.mid_game: Your poke scales. His mega form is scary. Avoid him.
Gnar.late_game: You outscale through poke. Avoid his mega.
Gnar.win_condition: Trade Q from range. Use E to slow. Avoid mega.
Gnar.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use E to kite. Avoid mega.

Volibear.trading_pattern: Volibear's W bite is oppressive. Your Q poke is safe. Trade from distance.
Volibear.ability_to_dodge: His R storm dive — move away from impact. Use E to slow.
Volibear.early_game: Volibear's all-in dominates. Trade Q from range. Use E to slow.
Volibear.mid_game: Your poke scales. His tankiness improves. Maintain distance.
Volibear.late_game: You outscale through poke. Avoid his all-in.
Volibear.win_condition: Trade Q from range. Use E to kite. Avoid his W.
Volibear.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use E to kite. Never close.
